---
title: "Evaluation"
pagetitle: "Evaluation — EM 619 MLPA"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Tentative
This grading scheme is **tentative** and may be modified during the semester based on student feedback. Any changes will be discussed in class and adopted by consensus between the instructor and students before implementation.
:::

## Grade Distribution

| Component | Weight |
|:----------|:------:|
| **Assignments** — 3 × 15% (in groups of 2, followed by viva) | **45%** |
| **Quizzes** — 3 × 15% | **45%** |
| **Attendance & Class Participation** | **10%** |

## Assignments

::: {.callout-note}
- **3 assignments**, each worth **15%** (45% total).
- Done in **groups of 2**, and evaluated through a **viva voce** where both members should be able to explain the submitted work.
- Questions are based on **applying course concepts** to real predictive tasks; most require **programming in Python**.
- You are encouraged to discuss problems with peers, TAs, and the instructor **before** submission. The final submission must be your group's own work.
:::

## Quizzes

::: {.callout-note}
- **3 quizzes**, each worth **15%** (45% total).
- Typically **conceptual questions** with short answers — one-line, multiple-choice, or fill-in-the-blank.
- Questions may come from content **already covered** or from material to be **covered in the next few classes**.
- Quizzes are held during the term and in the **Examination-1** and **Examination-2** windows (see key dates below).
:::

## Attendance & Class Participation

::: {.callout-note}
Worth **10%**. Students are expected to **ask questions and participate** in discussions; those who typically remain passive will be awarded zero participation marks. Attendance marks are computed from the ratio of **classes attended** to **total lectures**.
:::

## Key Dates (Module 3, 2026)

| Event | Dates |
|:------|:------|
| Classes commence | 27 Jun 2026 |
| Examination-1 | 10–16 Aug 2026 |
| Mid-Module Break | 17–23 Aug 2026 |
| Classes resume | 24 Aug 2026 |
| Last day of classes | 3 Oct 2026 |
| Examination-2 | 5–11 Oct 2026 |
| Make-up Exam | 13 Oct 2026 |
| Grade submission deadline | 15 Oct 2026 |
| Disclosure of grades | 16 Oct 2026 |
